nasb.text: Even a fool, when he keeps silent, is considered wise; When he closes his lips, he is considered prudent.

esv.text: Even a fool who keeps silent is considered wise; when he closes his lips, he is deemed intelligent.

cnv.text: 愚妄人默不作聲，也算是智慧； 閉口不言，也算是聰明。

ccb.text: 愚人缄默可算为智慧， 闭口不言可算为明智。

csbs.text: 愚妄人沉默时也算有智慧； 他闭口不言时也算有悟性。
